After a night's rest, Dorothy continues her journey. Boq offers a warning about the dangers ahead. While resting near a cornfield, Dorothy encounters a Scarecrow perched on a pole who suddenly comes to life.
From cautious optimism to sudden shock/surprise.
Dorothy traveling along the road with visible fatigue.
Dorothy in a state of shock facing the living scarecrow.
Dorothy rests near a cornfield and is startled by a scarecrow coming to life.
